WHAT WE DO.

MIEC is a leading Skills and Talent Development Corporation that is building a manpower pool for global industry requirements. SMS offers multi-disciplinary learning management and training delivery solutions to corporations, institutions, and individuals.

  • MIEC’s Corporate Learning Group (CLG): offers comprehensive suite of Management Training Services that includes custom Curriculum Design and Content Development, Learning Administration, Learning Delivery etc

  • MIEC’s Skills and Careers Group (SCG): delivers a diverse range of learning and talent development programs to millions of individual and corporate learners in areas including Banking, Finance & Insurance, Retail Sales Enablement, Management Education, Multi-Sectoral Vocational Skills, Digital Media Marketing etc

  • MIEC’s Graduate in Training Entrepreneurship Scheme (GTES):This is a fantastic opportunity for graduates to kick-start career in IT and trade. It is a work-based training programme that allows recent graduates to gain practical experience with us, giving them a head-start into the world of work.

Hosting Solutions

Current ICT trainings in diverse fields

E-commerce Solutions

Unique solutions for entrepreneurs

Digital Radio Service

Digital radio broadcast that breaks intercontinental barriers

MIEC Solutions

Unique projects for entrepreneur

Service Solutions

Connecting service providers with customers seamlessly

SCALABLE TECHNOLOGY.

With a strong focus on assuming leadership role in the Digital Learning World and to further accelerate MIEC’s growth and profitability, the establishment has charted a focused business strategy to address the Digital Transformation needs for individuals and corporate customers by offering training and consulting to help them re-invent themselves & their organizations.

IT Training

We offer first class professional training on different ICT programs. The option is limitless

Empowerment

We provide opportunities for young entrepreneurs to establish their ICT skills
